events.title: 10th Anniversary Party
events.note: Official event window: July 4, 10:00 a.m. to July 6, 2026, 8:00 p.m. local time.
events.noteTr: Resmi etkinlik aralığı: 4 Temmuz 10.00 ile 6 Temmuz 2026 20.00 yerel saat.
events.featuredPokemon: Gimmighoul with a 10th anniversary coin, cake-hat Pikachu, party-hat Eevee, and party-hat Wurmple.
events.featuredPokemonTr: 10. yıl dönümü coinli Gimmighoul, pasta şapkalı Pikachu, parti şapkalı Eevee ve parti şapkalı Wurmple.
events.bonuses: 4x catch XP, 4x catch Stardust, event-themed wild Pokémon more likely shiny, and possible special-background Gimmighoul.
events.bonusesTr: 4x yakalama XP, 4x yakalama Star Tozu, etkinlik temalı vahşi Pokémonlarda daha yüksek shiny şansı ve özel arka planlı Gimmighoul ihtimali.
events.raids: Treat paid research and special-background catches as keep-checks before cleanup.
events.raidsTr: Ücretli araştırma ve özel arka planlı yakalamaları temizlikten önce ayrı kontrol et.
events.research: Featured evolution moves: Venusaur Frenzy Plant, Charizard Blast Burn, Blastoise Hydro Cannon.
events.researchTr: Öne çıkan evrim hareketleri: Venusaur Frenzy Plant, Charizard Blast Burn, Blastoise Hydro Cannon.
events.summary: This is a costume, shiny, XP, Stardust, and special-background event. Do not bulk-transfer event catches blindly.
events.summaryTr: Bu etkinlik kostüm, shiny, XP, Star Tozu ve özel arka plan odaklı. Etkinlik yakalamalarını topluca göndermeden önce kontrol et.
events.prep: Tag costumed, shiny, and special-background catches. Check Gimmighoul separately before any transfer.
events.prepTr: Kostümlüleri, shiny'leri ve özel arka planlıları etiketle. Gimmighoul'u transferden önce ayrı kontrol et.
events.eventNotes: Check Gimmighoul, costumed Pikachu, costumed Eevee, costumed Wurmple, shiny catches, and special backgrounds before cleanup.
events.eventNotesTr: Gimmighoul'u, kostümlü Pikachu'yu, kostümlü Eevee'yi, kostümlü Wurmple'ı, shiny yakalamaları ve özel arka planları temizlikten önce kontrol et.
events.sourceNotes: Official Pokémon GO 10th Anniversary Party page: https://pokemongo.com/news/10th-anniversary-party

pokemon.name: Gimmighoul
pokemon.source: Coin Bag / Golden Lure / special background
pokemon.sourceTr: Coin Bag / Golden Lure / özel arka plan
pokemon.note: Special coin and possible special background make it a separate keep-check.
pokemon.noteTr: Özel coin ve özel arka plan ihtimali nedeniyle ayrı kontrol edilmeli.
pokemon.badgesTr: Shiny çıkabilir, Özel arka plan, Ek ödül
pokemon.sourceEs: Bolsa de Monedas / Cebo Dorado / fondo especial
pokemon.sourceFr: Sac de Pieces / Leurre Dore / arriere-plan special
pokemon.sourceIt: Borsa monete / Modulo esca dorato / sfondo speciale
pokemon.noteDe: Spezialmuenze und moeglicher Spezialhintergrund machen ihn zu einem eigenen Check.
pokemon.noteEs: La moneda especial y el posible fondo especial lo convierten en una revision aparte.
pokemon.noteFr: La piece speciale et l arriere-plan possible en font une verification a part.
pokemon.noteIt: La moneta speciale e il possibile sfondo speciale richiedono un controllo separato.

pokemon.name: Pikachu
pokemon.note: Cake-hat Pikachu is an event costume; tag before cleanup.
pokemon.noteTr: Pasta şapkalı Pikachu etkinlik kostümü; temizlikten önce etiketle.
pokemon.noteEs: Etiqueta Pikachu con disfraz antes de limpiar.
pokemon.noteFr: Marque Pikachu costume avant le tri.
pokemon.noteIt: Tagga Pikachu in costume prima della pulizia.

pokemon.name: Eevee
pokemon.note: Party-hat Eevee should be checked separately from normal Eevee.
pokemon.noteTr: Parti şapkalı Eevee normal Eevee'den ayrı kontrol edilmeli.
pokemon.noteDe: Partyhut-Evoli getrennt von normalem Evoli pruefen.
pokemon.noteEs: Revisa Eevee con gorro de fiesta separado del Eevee normal.
pokemon.noteFr: Verifie Evoli avec chapeau de fete separement d un Evoli normal.
pokemon.noteIt: Controlla Eevee con cappello festa separatamente da Eevee normale.

pokemon.name: Wurmple
pokemon.note: Party-hat Wurmple is easy to miss in bulk cleanup.
pokemon.noteTr: Parti şapkalı Wurmple toplu temizlikte kolayca gözden kaçabilir.
pokemon.noteDe: Partyhut-Wurmple kann beim schnellen Aufraeumen leicht uebersehen werden.
pokemon.noteEs: Wurmple con gorro de fiesta se puede pasar por alto en una limpieza rapida.
pokemon.noteFr: Wurmple avec chapeau de fete peut etre oublie pendant un tri rapide.
pokemon.noteIt: Wurmple con cappello festa puo sfuggire nella pulizia rapida.

events.noteDe: Offizielles Eventfenster: 4. Juli, 10:00 Uhr bis 6. Juli 2026, 20:00 Uhr Ortszeit.
events.noteEs: Periodo oficial: del 4 de julio a las 10:00 al 6 de julio de 2026 a las 20:00, hora local.
events.noteFr: Periode officielle : du 4 juillet a 10 h au 6 juillet 2026 a 20 h, heure locale.
events.noteIt: Periodo ufficiale: dal 4 luglio alle 10:00 al 6 luglio 2026 alle 20:00, ora locale.
events.featuredPokemonDe: Gimmighoul mit Jubilaeumsmuenze, Pikachu mit Kuchenhut, Evoli mit Partyhut und Wurmple mit Partyhut.
events.featuredPokemonEs: Gimmighoul con moneda de aniversario, Pikachu con gorro de tarta, Eevee con gorro de fiesta y Wurmple con gorro de fiesta.
events.featuredPokemonFr: Gimmighoul avec piece anniversaire, Pikachu avec chapeau gateau, Evoli avec chapeau de fete et Wurmple avec chapeau de fete.
events.featuredPokemonIt: Gimmighoul con moneta anniversario, Pikachu con cappello torta, Eevee con cappello festa e Wurmple con cappello festa.
events.bonusesDe: 4x Fang-EP, 4x Fang-Sternenstaub, Event-Pokemon in der Wildnis mit hoeherer Shiny-Chance und moegliches Gimmighoul mit Spezialhintergrund.
events.bonusesEs: 4x PX por captura, 4x Polvo Estelar por captura, Pokemon tematicos salvajes con mas probabilidad shiny y posible Gimmighoul con fondo especial.
events.bonusesFr: 4x PX de capture, 4x Poussiere Etoile de capture, Pokemon sauvages thematiques avec plus de chances shiny et Gimmighoul possible avec arriere-plan special.
events.bonusesIt: 4x PE cattura, 4x Polvere di stelle cattura, Pokemon selvatici a tema con piu possibilita shiny e possibile Gimmighoul con sfondo speciale.
events.raidsDe: Bezahlte Forschung und Spezialhintergrund-Faenge vor dem Aufraeumen getrennt pruefen.
events.raidsEs: Revisa la investigacion de pago y las capturas con fondo especial antes de limpiar.
events.raidsFr: Verifie l etude payante et les captures avec arriere-plan special separement avant le tri.
events.raidsIt: Controlla ricerca a pagamento e catture con sfondo speciale separatamente prima della pulizia.
events.researchDe: Besondere Entwicklungsattacken: Venusaur Frenzy Plant, Charizard Blast Burn, Blastoise Hydro Cannon.
events.researchEs: Movimientos destacados al evolucionar: Venusaur Frenzy Plant, Charizard Blast Burn, Blastoise Hydro Cannon.
events.researchFr: Attaques d evolution mises en avant : Venusaur Frenzy Plant, Charizard Blast Burn, Blastoise Hydro Cannon.
events.researchIt: Mosse evoluzione in evidenza: Venusaur Frenzy Plant, Charizard Blast Burn, Blastoise Hydro Cannon.
events.summaryDe: Dieses Event dreht sich um Kostueme, Shinys, EP, Sternenstaub und Spezialhintergruende. Event-Faenge nicht blind massenhaft verschicken.
events.summaryEs: Este evento va de disfraces, shiny, PX, Polvo Estelar y fondos especiales. No transfieras capturas del evento en bloque sin revisar.
events.summaryFr: Cet evenement met l accent sur costumes, shiny, PX, Poussiere Etoile et arriere-plans speciaux. Ne transfere pas les captures en masse sans verifier.
events.summaryIt: Questo evento punta su costumi, shiny, PE, Polvere di stelle e sfondi speciali. Non trasferire catture evento in blocco senza controllo.
events.prepDe: Kostuemierte, schillernde und Spezialhintergrund-Faenge taggen. Gimmighoul vor jedem Transfer separat pruefen.
events.prepEs: Etiqueta capturas con disfraz, shiny y fondo especial. Revisa Gimmighoul por separado antes de transferir.
events.prepFr: Marque les captures costumees, shiny et avec arriere-plan special. Verifie Gimmighoul separement avant tout transfert.
events.prepIt: Tagga catture in costume, shiny e con sfondo speciale. Controlla Gimmighoul separatamente prima di trasferire.
events.eventNotesDe: Gimmighoul, kostuemierte Pokemon, Shiny-Faenge und Spezialhintergruende vor dem Aufraeumen getrennt pruefen.
events.eventNotesEs: Revisa Gimmighoul, Pokemon con disfraz, capturas shiny y fondos especiales por separado antes de limpiar.
events.eventNotesFr: Verifie Gimmighoul, les Pokemon costumes, les captures shiny et les arriere-plans speciaux separement avant le tri.
events.eventNotesIt: Controlla Gimmighoul, Pokemon in costume, catture shiny e sfondi speciali separatamente prima della pulizia.

events.title: Road of Legends
events.note: Official event window: July 6, 12:01 a.m. to July 10, 2026, 11:59 p.m. local time.
events.noteTr: Resmi etkinlik aralığı: 6 Temmuz 00.01 ile 10 Temmuz 2026 23.59 yerel saat.
events.featuredPokemon: Team-hat Pikachu encounters, Legendary Raid candy targets, Link Charges, Incubators, and raid bonuses.
events.featuredPokemonTr: Takım şapkalı Pikachu karşılaşmaları, efsanevi akın şeker hedefleri, bağlantı enerjileri, kuluçka makineleri ve akın bonusları.
events.bonuses: GO Fest prep week with no Remote Raid Pass limit through GO Fest, raid bonuses, 1/2 Egg Hatch Distance, and GO Pass rewards.
events.bonusesTr: GO Fest hazırlık haftası: GO Fest'e kadar uzaktan akın bileti limiti yok, akın bonusları, 1/2 yumurta çıkma mesafesi ve GO Pass ödülleri.
events.raids: Legendary, Ultra Beast, Mega, Primal, and Super Mega raid catches may have special backgrounds during the week.
events.raidsTr: Efsanevi, Ultra Canavar, Mega, Kadim ve Süper Mega akın yakalamalarında hafta boyunca özel arka plan olabilir.
events.research: GO Pass: Road of Legends runs through July 12 and includes encounters, candy, Link Charges, Incubators, and raid rewards.
events.researchTr: GO Pass: Efsaneler Yolu 12 Temmuz'a kadar sürer; karşılaşmalar, şeker, bağlantı enerjisi, kuluçka makinesi ve akın ödülleri içerir.
events.summary: This is GO Fest prep: make storage, tag raid catches, and keep special-background or GO Pass reward encounters safe.
events.summaryTr: Bu GO Fest hazırlığıdır: depo aç, akın yakalamalarını etiketle, özel arka planlı veya GO Pass ödülü karşılaşmaları güvene al.
events.prep: Review raid catches separately. Daily Discoveries are paused during Road of Legends and GO Fest Global.
events.prepTr: Akın yakalamalarını ayrı incele. Günlük Keşifler, Efsaneler Yolu ve GO Fest Küresel boyunca duraklatılır.
events.eventNotes: Protect raid catches, team-hat Pikachu, special backgrounds, shiny catches, and GO Pass reward encounters before cleanup.
events.eventNotesTr: Temizlikten önce akın yakalamalarını, takım şapkalı Pikachu'yu, özel arka planları, shiny'leri ve GO Pass ödülü karşılaşmaları koru.
events.sourceNotes: Official Pokémon GO Road of Legends page: https://pokemongo.com/news/road-of-legends-2026

pokemon.name: Pikachu
pokemon.sourceTr: takım şapkalı kostüm / GO Pass karşılaşması
pokemon.note: Team-hat Pikachu is a costume catch; tag it before cleanup.
pokemon.noteTr: Takım şapkalı Pikachu kostümlü yakalamadır; temizlikten önce etiketle.
pokemon.noteEs: Etiqueta Pikachu con disfraz antes de limpiar.
pokemon.noteFr: Marque Pikachu costume avant le tri.
pokemon.noteIt: Tagga Pikachu in costume prima della pulizia.

pokemon.name: Legendary Raid targets
pokemon.note: Raid catches can matter for candy, IVs, shiny checks, and special backgrounds.
pokemon.noteTr: Akın yakalamaları şeker, IV, shiny kontrolü ve özel arka plan için önemli olabilir.
pokemon.badgesTr: Shiny çıkabilir, Akın, Özel arka plan
pokemon.noteDe: Raid-Faenge koennen fuer Bonbons, IVs, Shinys und Spezialhintergruende wichtig sein.
pokemon.noteEs: Las capturas de incursiones importan por Caramelos, IV, shiny y fondos especiales.
pokemon.noteFr: Les captures de raid comptent pour Bonbons, IV, shiny et arriere-plans speciaux.
pokemon.noteIt: Le catture raid contano per Caramelle, IV, shiny e sfondi speciali.

pokemon.name: Link Charges
pokemon.note: Track GO Pass rewards before the GO Fest weekend starts.
pokemon.noteTr: GO Fest hafta sonu başlamadan GO Pass ödüllerini takip et.
pokemon.noteEs: Controla recompensas del GO Pass antes del fin de semana de GO Fest.
pokemon.noteFr: Suis les recompenses GO Pass avant le week-end GO Fest.
pokemon.noteIt: Tieni traccia delle ricompense GO Pass prima del weekend GO Fest.

pokemon.name: Incubators
pokemon.note: Use the hatch-distance bonus to clear eggs before GO Fest.
pokemon.noteTr: GO Fest öncesi yumurta temizlemek için çıkma mesafesi bonusunu kullan.
pokemon.noteDe: Schluepfdistanz-Bonus nutzen, um Eier vor GO Fest zu leeren.
pokemon.noteEs: Usa el bonus de eclosion para liberar huevos antes de GO Fest.
pokemon.noteFr: Utilise le bonus d eclosion pour vider les oeufs avant le GO Fest.
pokemon.noteIt: Usa il bonus schiusa per liberare uova prima del GO Fest.

events.noteDe: Offizielles Eventfenster: 6. Juli, 00:01 Uhr bis 10. Juli 2026, 23:59 Uhr Ortszeit.
events.noteEs: Periodo oficial: del 6 de julio a las 00:01 al 10 de julio de 2026 a las 23:59, hora local.
events.noteFr: Periode officielle : du 6 juillet a 00 h 01 au 10 juillet 2026 a 23 h 59, heure locale.
events.noteIt: Periodo ufficiale: dal 6 luglio alle 00:01 al 10 luglio 2026 alle 23:59, ora locale.
events.featuredPokemonDe: Pikachu mit Teamhut, Bonbonziele aus legendaeren Raids, Link Charges, Brutmaschinen und Raid-Boni.
events.featuredPokemonEs: Pikachu con gorra de equipo, objetivos de Caramelos de incursiones legendarias, Link Charges, incubadoras y bonus de incursiones.
events.featuredPokemonFr: Pikachu avec casquette d equipe, objectifs de Bonbons des raids legendaires, Link Charges, incubateurs et bonus de raid.
events.featuredPokemonIt: Pikachu con cappello squadra, obiettivi Caramelle dai raid leggendari, Link Charges, incubatrici e bonus raid.
events.bonusesDe: GO-Fest-Vorbereitungswoche: kein Fern-Raid-Pass-Limit bis GO Fest, Raid-Boni, halbe Ei-Schluepfdistanz und GO-Pass-Belohnungen.
events.bonusesEs: Semana de preparacion para GO Fest: sin limite de pases de incursiones remotas hasta GO Fest, bonus de incursiones, media distancia de eclosion y recompensas del GO Pass.
events.bonusesFr: Semaine de preparation GO Fest : pas de limite de Pass de Raid a distance jusqu au GO Fest, bonus de raid, distance d eclosion divisee par deux et recompenses GO Pass.
events.bonusesIt: Settimana preparazione GO Fest: nessun limite ai Pass raid da remoto fino al GO Fest, bonus raid, mezza distanza schiusa e ricompense GO Pass.
events.raidsDe: Legendaere, Ultrabestien-, Mega-, Proto- und Super-Mega-Raid-Faenge koennen diese Woche Spezialhintergruende haben.
events.raidsEs: Las capturas de incursiones legendarias, Ultraentes, Mega, Primigenias y Supermega pueden tener fondos especiales durante la semana.
events.raidsFr: Les captures de raids legendaires, Ultra-Chimeres, Mega, Primo et Super Mega peuvent avoir des arriere-plans speciaux cette semaine.
events.raidsIt: Le catture da raid leggendari, Ultracreature, Mega, Primordiali e Super Mega possono avere sfondi speciali durante la settimana.
events.researchDe: GO Pass: Road of Legends laeuft bis 12. Juli und enthaelt Begegnungen, Bonbons, Link Charges, Brutmaschinen und Raid-Belohnungen.
events.researchEs: GO Pass: Road of Legends dura hasta el 12 de julio e incluye encuentros, Caramelos, Link Charges, incubadoras y recompensas de incursiones.
events.researchFr: Le GO Pass: Road of Legends dure jusqu au 12 juillet et inclut rencontres, Bonbons, Link Charges, incubateurs et recompenses de raid.
events.researchIt: GO Pass: Road of Legends dura fino al 12 luglio e include incontri, Caramelle, Link Charges, incubatrici e ricompense raid.
events.summaryDe: GO-Fest-Vorbereitung: Platz schaffen, Raid-Faenge taggen und Spezialhintergrund- oder GO-Pass-Belohnungen schuetzen.
events.summaryEs: Preparacion para GO Fest: haz espacio, etiqueta capturas de incursiones y protege fondos especiales o encuentros de recompensa del GO Pass.
events.summaryFr: Preparation GO Fest : fais de la place, marque les captures de raid et protege les rencontres a arriere-plan special ou recompenses GO Pass.
events.summaryIt: Preparazione GO Fest: libera spazio, tagga catture raid e proteggi sfondi speciali o incontri ricompensa GO Pass.
events.prepDe: Raid-Faenge getrennt pruefen. Daily Discoveries pausieren waehrend Road of Legends und GO Fest weltweit.
events.prepEs: Revisa capturas de incursiones por separado. Daily Discoveries se pausa durante Road of Legends y GO Fest mundial.
events.prepFr: Verifie les captures de raid separement. Daily Discoveries est en pause pendant Road of Legends et GO Fest mondial.
events.prepIt: Controlla le catture raid separatamente. Daily Discoveries e in pausa durante Road of Legends e GO Fest globale.
events.eventNotesDe: Raid-Faenge, Pikachu mit Teamhut, Spezialhintergruende, Shinys und GO-Pass-Belohnungen vor dem Aufraeumen schuetzen.
events.eventNotesEs: Protege capturas de incursiones, Pikachu con gorra de equipo, fondos especiales, shiny y recompensas del GO Pass antes de limpiar.
events.eventNotesFr: Protege les captures de raid, Pikachu avec casquette d equipe, arriere-plans speciaux, shiny et recompenses GO Pass avant le tri.
events.eventNotesIt: Proteggi catture raid, Pikachu con cappello squadra, sfondi speciali, shiny e ricompense GO Pass prima della pulizia.

events.title: GO Fest 2026: Global
events.note: Official event window: July 11–12, 2026, 10:00 a.m. to 7:00 p.m. local time.
events.noteTr: Resmi etkinlik aralığı: 11–12 Temmuz 2026, 10.00–19.00 yerel saat.
events.featuredPokemon: Global GO Fest featuring Mewtwo and Zeraora, with raid, research, shiny, background, and storage prep checks.
events.featuredPokemonTr: Mewtwo ve Zeraora odaklı küresel GO Fest; akın, araştırma, shiny, arka plan ve depo hazırlığı kontrolleri.
events.boostedPokemon: Mewtwo, Zeraora, team-hat Pikachu, raid catches, research rewards, and trade candidates.
events.boostedPokemonTr: Mewtwo, Zeraora, takım şapkalı Pikachu, akın yakalamaları, araştırma ödülleri ve takas adayları.
events.bonuses: Free for all Trainers during the event weekend, with Special Research, additional bonuses, and increased shiny chance.
events.bonusesTr: Etkinlik hafta sonu tüm Eğitmenlere ücretsiz; Özel Araştırma, ek bonuslar ve artan shiny şansı içerir.
events.raids: Review Mewtwo and other raid catches separately for IVs, shiny status, and special backgrounds.
events.raidsTr: Mewtwo ve diğer akın yakalamalarını IV, shiny durumu ve özel arka plan için ayrı incele.
events.research: Special Research leads to Zeraora. Do not mix research reward checks with bulk cleanup.
events.researchTr: Özel Araştırma Zeraora'ya götürür. Araştırma ödülü kontrollerini toplu temizlikle karıştırma.
events.summary: GO Fest creates many valuable catches quickly. Protect shiny, legendary, mythical, costume, background, raid, and trade candidates first.
events.summaryTr: GO Fest kısa sürede çok değerli yakalama oluşturur. Önce shiny, efsanevi, özel, kostüm, arka plan, akın ve takas adaylarını koru.
events.prep: Open storage before the event. After each session, review raid catches and tagged keepers before cleanup.
events.prepTr: Etkinlikten önce depo aç. Her oturumdan sonra temizlikten önce akın yakalamalarını ve etiketli saklanacakları incele.
events.eventNotes: Keep shiny, legendary, mythical, costume, special-background, raid, research, and trade candidates before any transfer.
events.eventNotesTr: Transferden önce shiny, efsanevi, özel, kostüm, özel arka plan, akın, araştırma ve takas adaylarını sakla.
events.sourceNotes: Official Pokémon GO Fest 2026 Global page: https://pokemongo.com/gofest/global

pokemon.name: Mewtwo
pokemon.sourceTr: Süper Mega Akınlar / özel arka plan
pokemon.note: Check raid IVs, shiny status, and special background before cleanup.
pokemon.noteTr: Temizlikten önce akın IV'lerini, shiny durumunu ve özel arka planı kontrol et.
pokemon.badgesTr: Shiny çıkabilir, Akın, Özel arka plan
pokemon.noteDe: Raid-IVs, Shiny-Status und Spezialhintergrund vor dem Aufraeumen pruefen.
pokemon.noteEs: Revisa IV de incursiones, shiny y fondo especial antes de limpiar.
pokemon.noteFr: Verifie IV de raid, shiny et arriere-plan special avant le tri.
pokemon.noteIt: Controlla IV raid, shiny e sfondo speciale prima della pulizia.

pokemon.name: Zeraora
pokemon.note: Research reward encounter; keep it out of cleanup flows.
pokemon.noteTr: Araştırma ödülü karşılaşmasıdır; temizlik akışlarından ayrı tut.
pokemon.noteEs: Encuentro de investigacion; mantenlo fuera de limpiezas masivas.
pokemon.noteFr: Rencontre d etude ; garde-la hors des tris en masse.
pokemon.noteIt: Incontro ricerca; tienilo fuori dalle pulizie di massa.

pokemon.name: Pikachu
pokemon.note: Team-hat Pikachu is a costume keep-check.
pokemon.noteTr: Takım şapkalı Pikachu kostümlü saklama kontrolüdür.
pokemon.noteEs: Etiqueta Pikachu con disfraz antes de limpiar.
pokemon.noteFr: Marque Pikachu costume avant le tri.
pokemon.noteIt: Tagga Pikachu in costume prima della pulizia.

pokemon.name: Raid and trade candidates
pokemon.note: Tag good raid catches and trade candidates before using cleanup searches.
pokemon.noteTr: Temizlik aramalarından önce iyi akın yakalamalarını ve takas adaylarını etiketle.
pokemon.noteDe: Gute Raid-Faenge und Tausch-Kandidaten vor Aufraeum-Suchen taggen.
pokemon.noteEs: Etiqueta buenas capturas de incursiones y candidatos de cambio antes de limpiar.
pokemon.noteFr: Marque bons raids et candidats a l echange avant les recherches de tri.
pokemon.noteIt: Tagga buone catture raid e candidati scambio prima delle ricerche di pulizia.

events.noteDe: Offizielles Eventfenster: 11.-12. Juli 2026, 10:00 bis 19:00 Uhr Ortszeit.
events.noteEs: Periodo oficial: 11-12 de julio de 2026, de 10:00 a 19:00, hora local.
events.noteFr: Periode officielle : 11-12 juillet 2026, de 10 h a 19 h, heure locale.
events.noteIt: Periodo ufficiale: 11-12 luglio 2026, dalle 10:00 alle 19:00, ora locale.
events.featuredPokemonDe: Weltweites GO Fest mit Mewtu und Zeraora sowie Checks fuer Raids, Forschung, Shinys, Hintergruende und Box-Platz.
events.featuredPokemonEs: GO Fest mundial con Mewtwo y Zeraora, mas revisiones de incursiones, investigacion, shiny, fondos y espacio.
events.featuredPokemonFr: GO Fest mondial avec Mewtwo et Zeraora, plus verifications raids, etudes, shiny, arriere-plans et stockage.
events.featuredPokemonIt: GO Fest globale con Mewtwo e Zeraora, piu controlli raid, ricerca, shiny, sfondi e spazio.
events.boostedPokemonDe: Mewtu, Zeraora, Pikachu mit Teamhut, Raid-Faenge, Forschungsbelohnungen und Tausch-Kandidaten.
events.boostedPokemonEs: Mewtwo, Zeraora, Pikachu con gorra de equipo, capturas de incursiones, recompensas de investigacion y candidatos de cambio.
events.boostedPokemonFr: Mewtwo, Zeraora, Pikachu avec casquette d equipe, captures de raid, recompenses d etude et candidats a l echange.
events.boostedPokemonIt: Mewtwo, Zeraora, Pikachu con cappello squadra, catture raid, ricompense ricerca e candidati scambio.
events.bonusesDe: Fuer alle Trainer am Event-Wochenende kostenlos, mit Spezialforschung, zusaetzlichen Boni und erhoehter Shiny-Chance.
events.bonusesEs: Gratis para todos los Entrenadores durante el fin de semana, con investigacion especial, bonus adicionales y mas probabilidad shiny.
events.bonusesFr: Gratuit pour tous les Dresseurs pendant le week-end, avec etude speciale, bonus supplementaires et plus de chances shiny.
events.bonusesIt: Gratis per tutti gli Allenatori nel weekend, con ricerca speciale, bonus aggiuntivi e maggiore possibilita shiny.
events.raidsDe: Mewtu und andere Raid-Faenge getrennt auf IVs, Shiny-Status und Spezialhintergruende pruefen.
events.raidsEs: Revisa Mewtwo y otras capturas de incursiones por IV, shiny y fondos especiales por separado.
events.raidsFr: Verifie Mewtwo et les autres captures de raid separement pour IV, shiny et arriere-plans speciaux.
events.raidsIt: Controlla Mewtwo e altre catture raid separatamente per IV, shiny e sfondi speciali.
events.researchDe: Spezialforschung fuehrt zu Zeraora. Forschungsbelohnungen nicht mit Massen-Aufraeumen vermischen.
events.researchEs: La investigacion especial lleva a Zeraora. No mezcles recompensas de investigacion con limpieza masiva.
events.researchFr: L etude speciale mene a Zeraora. Ne melange pas les recompenses d etude avec le tri en masse.
events.researchIt: La ricerca speciale porta a Zeraora. Non mescolare ricompense ricerca con pulizia di massa.
events.summaryDe: GO Fest erzeugt schnell viele wertvolle Faenge. Erst Shinys, Legendaere, Mystische, Kostueme, Hintergruende, Raids und Tausch-Kandidaten schuetzen.
events.summaryEs: GO Fest genera muchas capturas valiosas rapido. Protege primero shiny, legendarios, singulares, disfraces, fondos, incursiones y candidatos de cambio.
events.summaryFr: GO Fest cree vite beaucoup de captures precieuses. Protege d abord shiny, legendaires, fabuleux, costumes, arriere-plans, raids et candidats a l echange.
events.summaryIt: GO Fest crea molte catture preziose rapidamente. Proteggi prima shiny, leggendari, misteriosi, costumi, sfondi, raid e candidati scambio.
events.prepDe: Vor dem Event Platz schaffen. Nach jeder Runde Raid-Faenge und getaggte Keeper vor dem Aufraeumen pruefen.
events.prepEs: Haz espacio antes del evento. Despues de cada sesion, revisa capturas de incursiones y guardados etiquetados antes de limpiar.
events.prepFr: Fais de la place avant l evenement. Apres chaque session, verifie les captures de raid et les gardes marques avant le tri.
events.prepIt: Libera spazio prima dell evento. Dopo ogni sessione controlla catture raid e tenuti taggati prima della pulizia.
events.eventNotesDe: Shinys, Legendaere, Mystische, Kostueme, Spezialhintergruende, Raids, Forschung und Tausch-Kandidaten vor jedem Transfer behalten.
events.eventNotesEs: Guarda shiny, legendarios, singulares, disfraces, fondos especiales, incursiones, investigacion y candidatos de cambio antes de transferir.
events.eventNotesFr: Garde shiny, legendaires, fabuleux, costumes, arriere-plans speciaux, raids, etudes et candidats a l echange avant tout transfert.
events.eventNotesIt: Tieni shiny, leggendari, misteriosi, costumi, sfondi speciali, raid, ricerca e candidati scambio prima di trasferire.
